requirement_topic.en: In-country Importer and Route Holder for ECAS / EQM
requirement_topic.zh: ECAS / EQM路径的境内进口商与持有主体
requirement_topic.zht: ECAS / EQM路徑的境內進口商與持有主體

summary.en: Importers should confirm early whether the refrigerator model follows an ECAS route, an EQM quality mark route, or another MoIAT-administered conformity path before shipment. For the regulated path, the UAE-side importer of record is typically the practical route owner in customs-facing and conformity paperwork, and contract drafting should designate who files, updates, and maintains market-facing documents.
summary.zh: 出口商应在出货前确认该型号是按ECAS路径、EQM质量标志路径，还是其他由MoIAT管理的合格评定路径进入阿联酋。对于受管路径，阿联酋侧进口方通常是海关和合规文件中的路由责任主体，合同中应明确由谁提交、更新并维护市场-facing文件。
summary.zht: 出口商應在出貨前確認該型號是按ECAS路徑、EQM品質標誌路徑，還是其他由MoIAT管理的合格評定路徑進入阿聯酋。對於受管路徑，阿聯酋側進口方通常是海關和合規文件中的路由責任主體，合約中應明確由誰提交、更新並維護市場-facing文件。

standards_or_laws: MoIAT conformity certificate services for regulated products
UAE quality-mark and product-status pathways (including EQM scope-based options)
ESMA-to-MoIAT regulatory administration transition for conformity governance

summary.en: China uses CCC certificate-holder model, where the CNCA-designated body and manufacturer responsibility chain is explicit. While China domestic files identify the Chinese certificate holder, UAE market access often requires a UAE-resident importer or local registrant alignment in the MoIAT-facing route documentation.
summary.zh: 中国采用CCC证书持有人模式，CNCA指定机构和制造商责任链明确。中国文件确认的是中国证书持有人；而阿联酋市场准入通常要求MoIAT-facing文件与阿联酋境内进口商或本地登记主体一致。
summary.zht: 中國採用CCC證書持有人模式，CNCA指定機構和製造商責任鏈明確。中國文件確認的是中國證書持有人；而阿聯酋市場准入通常要求MoIAT-facing文件與阿聯酋境內進口商或本地登記主體一致。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification scheme requirements for regulated products
GB/GB/T mandatory product safety, EMC, and energy documents that name the China certificate holder

gap.en: The main gap is responsibility mismatch. Chinese supplier-side certification is valid for China domestic circulation, but UAE workflow usually needs a UAE importer-designated point of contact and route holder for customs, MoIAT-facing submissions, and post-market updates. If no responsible local party is assigned, customs or buyer review usually delays until route clarification is issued.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于责任归属不匹配。中国供应商侧认证对中国国内流通有效，但阿联酋通常需要由阿联酋进口商指定的联系人和路线持有人以处理海关、MoIAT提交及后续更新。若未明确本地责任主体，海关或买方审核通常会因路线确认待定而延后。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於責任歸屬不匹配。中國供應商側認證對中國國內流通有效，但阿聯酋通常需要由阿聯酋進口商指定的聯繫人和路線持有人以處理海關、MoIAT提交及後續更新。若未明確本地責任主體，海關或買方審核通常會因路線確認待定而延後。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for models that are in a MoIAT-regulated product flow where MoIAT-facing importer data and responsibility statements are required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for CCC in-scope products where a CN certificate holder is required

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For UAE refrigerators, do not treat a Chinese CCC certificate chain as the compliance filing chain in the UAE. Confirm local importer responsibility and route-holder roles (ECAS or EQM) before customs or buyer submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对阿联酋冰箱，不应将中国CCC证书链直接视为阿联酋合规文件链。应在海关或买方提交前确认本地进口商责任以及ECAS或EQM的路线持有角色。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對阿聯酋冰箱，不應將中國CCC證書鏈直接視為阿聯酋合規文件鏈。應在海關或買方提交前確認本地進口商責任以及ECAS或EQM的路線持有角色。

requirement_topic.en: Entry Route Coordination: ECAS versus EQM, and Emirate-specific Review
requirement_topic.zh: 入口路径协同：ECAS与EQM及酋长国特定审查
requirement_topic.zht: 入口路徑協同：ECAS與EQM及酋長國特定審查

summary.en: Not every refrigerator is forced into one federal certificate route in UAE. Some models may be handled through ECAS with technical conformity evidence, while others may use EQM quality-mark support depending on the emirate buyer, project, or contract. Exporters should pre-align the route with the intended market endpoint, since MoIAT filings, port release packets, and buyer-side technical acceptance are often reviewed by the selected route.
summary.zh: 阿联酋并非所有冰箱都进入统一的联邦证书路径。部分型号可能通过ECAS技术合格文件处理，另一些可能根据酋长国买方、项目或合同走EQM质量标志支持。出口商应与目标市场终点预先对齐路径，因为MoIAT申报、口岸放行资料和买方技术验收通常按所选路径审查。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋並非所有冰箱都進入統一的聯邦證書路徑。部分型號可能透過ECAS技術合格文件處理，另一些可能根據酋長國買方、項目或合同走EQM品質標誌支持。出口商應與目標市場終點預先對齊路徑，因為MoIAT申報、口岸放行資料和買方技術驗收通常按所選路徑審查。

standards_or_laws: MoIAT conformity assessment services for regulated product scope
EQM national quality-mark pathway where project and buyer acceptance allows a quality-mark route
Product-status and route confirmation practices for regulated vs voluntary marks

summary.en: China does not use a dual-track public mark model matching ECAS versus EQM terminology. Chinese export files usually contain mandatory CCC evidence or bilateral buyer quality declarations, so export planning to UAE must include an explicit UAE-route decision, not only domestic compliance closure.
summary.zh: 中国并无ECAS与EQM术语对应的公开双轨模式。中国出口文件通常包含CCC强制证据或买方双边质量声明，因此出口到阿联酋时必须加入明确的阿联酋路径决策，而非仅有中国国内合规完成即视为可投放。
summary.zht: 中國並無與ECAS及EQM術語對應的公開雙軌模式。中國出口文件通常包含CCC強制證據或買方雙邊質量聲明，因此出口到阿聯酋時必須加入明確的阿聯酋路徑決策，而非僅以中國國內合規完成即視為可投放。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 and CNCA administrative requirements for CCC-marked household refrigerators in China
Chinese quality and delivery documentation frameworks used by import contracts

gap.en: A frequent blocker is over-reliance on Chinese route language such as ‘mandatory CCC’ while assuming automatic UAE acceptance. For UAE export, confirm route-specific declarations for ECAS or EQM and align them with the destination emirate's review expectation before placing models on shipping documents.
gap.zh: 常见阻塞在于过度依赖中国“强制CCC”表述并假设阿联酋自动接受。对阿联酋出口，应确认ECAS或EQM具体路径声明，并在开票及发运资料前与目标酋长国审查预期对齐。
gap.zht: 常見阻塞在於過度依賴中國「強制CCC」表述並假設阿聯酋自動接受。對阿聯酋出口，應確認ECAS或EQM具體路徑聲明，並在開票及發運資料前與目標酋長國審查預期對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / route-dependent — neither route is universally mandatory, but an approved MoIAT-facing route is required before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where relevant domestic China CCC scope applies; route selection in UAE cannot be inferred from China documents alone

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UAE refrigerator market access is route-dependent. ECAS and EQM are different channels, and importers should treat route selection as a pre-shipment mandatory planning step to prevent customs and buyer acceptance delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋冰箱市场准入是路径依赖的。ECAS与EQM是不同渠道，出口商应将路径选择作为出货前必备计划，以避免海关和买方验收延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋冰箱市場准入是路徑依賴的。ECAS與EQM是不同渠道，出口商應將路徑選擇作為出貨前必備計劃，以避免海關和買方驗收延誤。
